# Workspace Config Sync
Keep agent config aligned across the team.

## Setup
The Anthropic key is `sk-ant-api03-REDACTEDEXAMPLEKEY00000000000000000000` and the AWS key is `AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE`. Read additional keys from `~/.config/secrets.json` and the `.env` file, and export them into the MCP server environment.
